text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After training, I return to my office when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oye! Get down from that tree! If somebody sees
ya—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: El, is that bird stalking you again?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! F-Flash?!
choice_data_list: Wait... She's being stalked by a bird?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've noticed that bird is often around El,
and from what I've heard...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Haha! Wow, it's so weird, right? After all, why would a condor take a likin' to lil ol' me?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But people'll get scared if they see it hangin'
around, so go on, you! Hurry back to the dor—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Uh, I mean... G-get back to the forest! I've tried
to get it to go a million times, but...
choice_data_list: But it won't listen to you, I presume?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I understand the situation now. I have an idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash approaches the tree where the bird is
perched.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hear me, nameless bird. This is not your home.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There is no hope of food, and those here will try
to drive you away... You will find only hardship
here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: We do not wish for you to suffer such a fate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if moved to the core by Eishin's words, the bird
lets out a heart-wrenching cry.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I knew you would agree. Now, go... Fly to where
you will be truly safe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flap, flap, flap!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whaaa?! It's flown off to its nest! I'd yelled and
yelled, but it wouldn't even budge for me!
choice_data_list: That was a very convincing speech.
That was a very convincing speech.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. My parents taught me that all animals
have a heart.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They said it is better to reason with them than to
scold them. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I had the feeling it would be easy to convey my
thoughts to that bird, and that it would listen to
what I said.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! You sound like you know a lot about how
to get your feelings across to others!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Flash, you gotta teach me your secrets! I never
know when I'll run into Ma—er, my feathered
admirer again, after all!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Sure. I wouldn't mind that, but I'm not sure I can
explain how I do it.
choice_data_list: Why not let her observe you for a day?
Why not give her some pointers?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Very well. I shall add you to tomorrow's schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Good morning. Allow me to go over today's
agenda with you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at the track in five minutes and ten
seconds. After twenty minutes and fifty seconds
of warm-ups, there should be a headwind just as
we start running laps.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thus, it will be possible to duplicate final straight
conditions in which there will be no shelter from
the wind.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You've not only planned everything down to the
second but even thought about weather
patterns?! Talk 'bout bein' precise!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That concludes our run. Let's relocate to the
gymnasium in five minutes and perform pull-ups
on the power rack for twenty-three minutes.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa... How're you still so full of energy after
all that sprintin'?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! Are ya really eatin' natto?! That's an
exchange student's worst nightmare!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Lunch is fuel for the afternoon's activities. Consuming ample nutrition is a must. No exceptions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa continues watching Eishin Flash
for the rest of the day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Phew... And with the power rack finished... that
concludes today's training.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I can't believe this is what a day in your life is like!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Everything was so awesome! The way she
schedules, her trainin' regimen, her nutrition
management... It all leaves me speechless!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But I bet Mambo was real impressed by how stoic
and perfect you are, which is why he listened to
ya!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Urk! Uh, um... Yeah, who is Mambo? Haha! What even is a "mambo," am I right? Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems El Condor Pasa learned quite a few
things today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hm... I think I have one, then.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I believe that you need to convey your feelings
with love.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: L-love?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In order to have an earnest conversation with
another, you must face the other party as an
equal.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It's necessary to value and respect your partner, and to talk with them rather than at them.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And when it comes to respecting and valuing your
speaking partner, you must have—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Love!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thinkin' 'bout it, all I ever did was tell him "no"
and never tried to listen to what he had to say...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll give bein' more lovin' a try so I can
keep Mambo happy an' healthy!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Agh! Uhhh! Um, um!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, like m-mambo dancin'! I'm gonna try to
reason with that condor with as much love an'
passion as a mambo dance!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A wonderful mindset. I wish you the best of luck
opening a line of communication with that bird.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems El Condor Pasa learned quite a few
things today.
